programmes.show_description: 4/5. Arlo Parks in conversation and performing at the BBC.
5/5. Arlo Parks curates a show filled with songs that have changed her as a person, including Massive Attack. First broadcast in January 2021.
2/5. Chilled tunes on the Park Stage from the Mercury Prize-winning singer and poet.
3/5. Open up Arlo's sonic scrapbook for an hour of music, thoughts and reflections. Plus the music producer Paul Epworth joins to swap songs and stories, from Madlib to Pixies.
5/5. A playlist celebrating the music of Arlo Parks and its roots and branches - including artists she's been influenced by and those she's inspired.
The biggest tunes to start the day, your chance to vote on a 'Lost Love', plus will your track get a spin on the wheel?
Beth Ditto joins Nick to discuss their upcoming DJ set at 6 Music Festival 2026!
Lauren gives you the finest blend of fantastic music for your Tuesday morning.
Craig invites you to take a moment to chill out and relax in the Zen Den, with the help of two calming songs suggested by you.
Andy Votel joins Huw to talk about some of Manchester's greatest record labels. Kelly Lee Owens chooses this week's 'Song I Wish I'd Written'.
Nathan Shepherd and Deb Grant hand-pick and share their latest new music obsessions.
Marc Riley plays his music loves from every era and genre.
In this episode, Jay shares one of the biggest perks of touring... getting to explore record stores across the globe.
Icelandic band Of Monsters and Men take over the Indie Forever playlist!
Following their appearance at the 6 Music festival another chance to hear The Horrors recorded live at Glastonbury in 2009 and in session for 6 Music.
Following their appearance at the 6 Music Festival another chance to hear Bloc Party recorded live at the Fez Club, Reading & Somerset House, London.
3/4. 6 Music Festival 2026 headliner Courtney Barnett shares her songwriting inspirations.
Want to hear the latest tracks 6 Music have added to their playlist? Then listen here!
Chris with the early morning breakfast show and it's the start of the 6 Music Fesival!
Nick looks forward to 6 Music Festival 2026, which kicks off later today.
Lauren gets your Wednesday going with the most magnificent music.
The 6 Music Festival starts TODAY! Whether you're heading to Manchester or listening from home, Craig is here to help get you in the mood.
Huw is live from Band on the Wall, and will be chatting to TTSSFU, Pyncher and Ellen Beth Abdi in the lead-up to BBC Introducing live at 6 Music Festival in Manchester.
Nathan and Deb are live from Band on the Wall in Manchester for the 6 Music Festival, with live sets from Ellen Beth Abdi and pyncher.
Live from the 6 Music Festival.
Nathan Shepherd and Deb Grant are live from Band on the Wall, Manchester for the 6 Music Festival!
Live from the 6 Music Festival.
Emily is live from Band on the Wall, Manchester for the 6 Music Festival!
Live from the 6 Music Festival.
Ryan and Chris come together (with their matching Prince tattoos) for an hour of celebration of the great Paisley Park.
